creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
The zip file for audio/id3ren no longer exists on the mastersite.
So the ports need to be fetched from another place.

Fix: 

I have now used for MASTER_SITE instead of:
http://tscnet.com/pages/badcrc/apps/id3ren/

http://adis.on.ca/pub/Linux/cd-tools/
fetches ok and checksum also ok.
How-To-Repeat: Try to fetch it.
